name: GLOBAL INDUSTRIAL Co
summary: Global Industrial Company is a value-added industrial products distributor that sells a broad range of industrial and commercial products to businesses in North America. The company markets products including material handling equipment, storage solutions, workbenches, safety products, and facility maintenance supplies through catalogs, e-commerce, and a direct sales force under the Global Industrial brand.

products.name: Material Handling Equipment
products.description: Industrial equipment for moving and managing materials in commercial and industrial settings.

products.name: Storage Solutions
products.description: Industrial shelving, racking, and storage products for facilities.

products.name: Workbenches
products.description: Commercial and industrial workbenches for facilities and manufacturing environments.

products.name: Safety Products
products.description: Workplace safety equipment and supplies for industrial and commercial customers.

products.name: Facility Maintenance Supplies
products.description: Supplies and equipment for maintaining commercial and industrial facilities.
